About this item

  • 98% NATURAL - Our Body Butter Vanilla Cloud is made with 98% naturally derived ingredients, free from sulphates, alcohols, parabens, and SLS/SLES, ensuring the purest care for your baby's skin.
  • ALLERGEN-FREE VANILLA CLOUD - Infused with a gentle, allergen-free sweet vanilla fragrance, this body butter combines soothing shea butter, cocoa butter, and camomile to keep your baby’s delicate skin moisturised and nourished.
  • GENTLE FOR NEWBORNS & SENSITIVE SKIN - Clinically proven to be mild and gentle, our Body Butter is perfect for newborns and babies with sensitive skin, providing long-lasting hydration without irritation.
  • DERMATOLOGICALLY TESTED & PAEDIATRICIAN APPROVED: Our entire range has undergone rigorous dermatological and clinical testing to ensure it’s safe, effective, and suitable for even the most delicate skin.
  • CRUELTY-FREE, VEGAN, AND ALCOHOL-FREE - Nala’s Baby Body Butter is committed to ethical care, being completely vegan, cruelty-free, and made without alcohol, ensuring it’s kind to both your baby and the planet.

    Sustainability features

    This product has sustainability features recognised by trusted certifications.
    Manufacturing practices
    Manufactured using processes that reduce the risk of negative environmental impact.
    As certified by
    ECOLOGO

    ECOLOGO

    ECOLOGO certified products are made with materials that reduce environmental impact at one or more stages of their life cycle, from raw materials to end of life. An ECOLOGO certification indicates that a product has met environmental performance standards, which include criteria in some or all of the following categories: materials, energy, manufacturing and operations, health and environment, product performance and use, and product stewardship and innovation. Products are evaluated on the applicable criteria through testing and auditing.
    Packaging efficiency
    Reduced air and/or water in the product or packaging for more efficient transportation.

Important information

Safety Information:

Avoid contact with eyes. If this occurs rinse with water. Keep out of reach of children.

Ingredients:

Aqua, Glycerin, Microcrystalline Cellulose, Betaine, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Sodium Benzoate, Cellulose Gum, Sodium Stearoyl Glutamate, Citric Acid, Parfum, Potassium Sorbate, Argania Spinosa (Argan) Kernel Oil, Sodium Gluconate, Hydroxypropyl Oxidized Starch Pg-Trimonium Chloride, Lactic Acid, Sodium Chloride, Sodium Lactate.

Reviews
Nala's Baby Body Butter Vanilla Cloud | Supersize | Allergen-Free Sweet Vanilla Fragrance | 98% Natural | Dermatologically-tested and Paediatrician-approved | Vegan | 500ml | Nalas Baby

Product description

Product description

Nala's baby Body Butter Vanilla Cloud is a beautiful smelling, deep moisturiser, packed with skin-caring natural ingredients that give your little one's skin some TLC. With our calming blend of shea butter, cocoa butter and camomile, it will leave your little cub feeling moisturised and nourished from head to toe. 98% naturally derived Dermatologist & Paediatrician approved Suitable for sensitive and eczema prone skin Clean ingredients, awarded the perfect score ‘0' on Think Dirty Free from sulphates, alcohols, parabens, SLS/SLES and much more (see our parent checklist for full list) Suitable for newborns upwards With a gentle coconut based scent Cruelty-free, vegan and alcohol-free.

Ingredients

Aqua, Glycerin, Microcrystalline Cellulose, Betaine, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Sodium Benzoate, Cellulose Gum, Sodium Stearoyl Glutamate, Citric Acid, Parfum, Potassium Sorbate, Argania Spinosa (Argan) Kernel Oil, Sodium Gluconate, Hydroxypropyl Oxidized Starch Pg-Trimonium Chloride, Lactic Acid, Sodium Chloride, Sodium Lactate.

Safety Warning

Avoid contact with eyes. If this occurs rinse with water. Keep out of reach of children.

Manufacturer Contact Information

Lovingly made for: Nala's Baby Limited, UK: 2 Oak Court, North Leigh Business Park, Oxfordshire, OX29 6SW. EU: ADSL (Ireland) Ltd., D07 CX7P, Éire.

See more

Focus on sustainability

Small changes in product size and weight lead to lower carbon emissions.

We created Compact by Design to identify products that, while they may not always look very different, have a more efficient design. With the removal of excess air and water, products require less packaging and become more efficient to dispatch. At scale, these small differences in product size and weight lead to significant carbon emission reductions.

Here are a few of the many ways products can qualify:

The video demonstrates visible skin improvements and positions the product as a versatile solution for body, face, and hair nourishment.

How customer reviews and ratings work

Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings, help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

  • Nova Baret
    5 out of 5 stars
    We need more in store supplies and better positioning…
    Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 25 May 2026
    Scent Name: Vanilla Cloud
    Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
    Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

    We have followed “Nala’s baby products” since my 6 month old granddaughter randomly grabbed a tub off the shelves whilst out shopping. I took a sneak whiff of “Vanilla Cloud Oil” and we have been hooked ever since.. Now, that was then and this is now and the fragrances/produce keep getting stronger, imaginative and better and better for all our skin textures and needs.

    However, can we please have not just more produce, fragrances etc. But much more in store availability ?! As, when we do our weekly shopping it can be very difficult to allocate. And when we do find what’s on offer. They are either situated within the middle shelves or even lower?!?! Making it hard for a grandma like me to bend, scope and buy!!!

    Now I find such positioning somewhat confusing.

    As, nine times out of ten “when found” what is available is very limited. Meaning high sales “great” but low restocking.. Which, reiterates the success of the brand regardless of the terrible in store positioning?! … Therefore, “if the owners are listening” let’s get this fixed !! As, myself, granddaughters” yes I have two now” my hubby, and everyone in the school staff room needs more “Nala’s baby”. And we shouldn’t have to play hide and seek to buy it.!… I mean with out “Nala’s Baby” how else are we to sniff, apply and glow…

    Read moreRead less

Product Summary: Nala's Baby Body Butter Vanilla Cloud | Supersize | Allergen-Free Sweet Vanilla Fragrance | 98% Natural | Dermatologically-tested and Paediatrician-approved | Vegan | 500ml | Nalas Baby

From Nala's Baby

4.5 out of 5 stars, 25 ratings

Other sellers

Other sellers

About this Item

  • 98% NATURAL - Our Body Butter Vanilla Cloud is made with 98% naturally derived ingredients, free from sulphates, alcohols, parabens, and SLS/SLES, ensuring the purest care for your baby's skin.
  • ALLERGEN-FREE VANILLA CLOUD - Infused with a gentle, allergen-free sweet vanilla fragrance, this body butter combines soothing shea butter, cocoa butter, and camomile to keep your baby’s delicate skin moisturised and nourished.
  • GENTLE FOR NEWBORNS & SENSITIVE SKIN - Clinically proven to be mild and gentle, our Body Butter is perfect for newborns and babies with sensitive skin, providing long-lasting hydration without irritation.
  • DERMATOLOGICALLY TESTED & PAEDIATRICIAN APPROVED: Our entire range has undergone rigorous dermatological and clinical testing to ensure it’s safe, effective, and suitable for even the most delicate skin.
  • CRUELTY-FREE, VEGAN, AND ALCOHOL-FREE - Nala’s Baby Body Butter is committed to ethical care, being completely vegan, cruelty-free, and made without alcohol, ensuring it’s kind to both your baby and the planet.

Product description

Product description
Nala's baby Body Butter Vanilla Cloud is a beautiful smelling, deep moisturiser, packed with skin-caring natural ingredients that give your little one's skin some TLC. With our calming blend of shea butter, cocoa butter and camomile, it will leave your little cub feeling moisturised and nourished from head to toe. 98% naturally derived Dermatologist & Paediatrician approved Suitable for sensitive and eczema prone skin Clean ingredients, awarded the perfect score ‘0' on Think Dirty Free from sulphates, alcohols, parabens, SLS/SLES and much more (see our parent checklist for full list) Suitable for newborns upwards With a gentle coconut based scent Cruelty-free, vegan and alcohol-free.
Ingredients
Aqua, Glycerin, Microcrystalline Cellulose, Betaine, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Sodium Benzoate, Cellulose Gum, Sodium Stearoyl Glutamate, Citric Acid, Parfum, Potassium Sorbate, Argania Spinosa (Argan) Kernel Oil, Sodium Gluconate, Hydroxypropyl Oxidized Starch Pg-Trimonium Chloride, Lactic Acid, Sodium Chloride, Sodium Lactate.
Safety Warning
Avoid contact with eyes. If this occurs rinse with water. Keep out of reach of children.
Manufacturer Contact Information
Lovingly made for: Nala's Baby Limited, UK: 2 Oak Court, North Leigh Business Park, Oxfordshire, OX29 6SW. EU: ADSL (Ireland) Ltd., D07 CX7P, Éire.

Options Available
